goal: Consolidate duplicated rebuild_blocked_cache (W-2), add retry-on-SQLITE_BUSY with exponential backoff for multi-agent robustness

tasks.name: Consolidate rebuild_blocked_cache and fix W-2
tasks.action: Update graph.py rebuild_blocked_cache to filter closed issues (add JOIN issues + WHERE status NOT IN closed in both steps). Remove duplicate _rebuild_blocked_cache from __init__.py. Replace all __init__.py calls with import from graph.py.

tasks.name: Add retry-on-SQLITE_BUSY helper
tasks.action: Add with_retry(fn, *args, max_retries=3, base_delay=0.1, **kwargs) to storage.py. Catches sqlite3.OperationalError with 'database is locked', retries with exponential backoff (0.1s, 0.2s, 0.4s), re-raises after final failure. Uses time.sleep from stdlib.

tasks.name: Wire retry into write operations
tasks.action: Import with_retry from .storage. Wrap claim(), close(), and create() DB interactions with retry. Apply at outermost level covering BEGIN IMMEDIATE through commit. Do NOT wrap read-only operations.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import create, claim, close, init; from pathlib import Path; import tempfile; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); r=Path(d); init(r); i=create('Test',root=r); claim(i.id,actor='a',root=r); close(i.id,root=r); print('OK')"

planVerify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import init, create, claim, close, ready, dep_add, stats; from pathlib import Path; import tempfile; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); r=Path(d); init(r); a=create('A',root=r); b=create('B',root=r); dep_add(b.id,a.id,root=r); assert len(ready(root=r))==1; claim(a.id,actor='x',root=r); close(a.id,root=r); assert len(ready(root=r))==1; print('ALL PASS')"
commitMessage: fix(memory): consolidate blocked cache, add retry-on-busy
